terms.name: Executive Workspace
terms.definition: Role-personalized command center from canonical institutional data

terms.name: Executive Briefing
terms.definition: Continuous synthesis of what leadership needs to know

terms.name: Executive Alert
terms.definition: Priority notification with evidence and recommended actions

terms.name: Decision Queue
terms.definition: Approvals and governance items awaiting executive action

terms.name: Decision Workspace
terms.definition: Evidence-backed decision context with human approval required

terms.name: Mission Intelligence
terms.definition: Critical, delayed, and blocked mission situational awareness

terms.name: Financial Intelligence
terms.definition: Budget health integrated with mission execution

terms.name: Resource Intelligence
terms.definition: Fleet, facilities, inventory, and procurement awareness

terms.name: Organization Intelligence
terms.definition: Department health, governance, and leadership coverage

terms.name: Risk Intelligence
terms.definition: Strategic, mission, financial, and operational risks

terms.name: War Room
terms.definition: Temporary executive command center for crises and campaigns

terms.name: Scenario Planning
terms.definition: What-if analysis that never alters live data until approved

terms.name: Executive Timeline
terms.definition: Institutional memory of major decisions and milestones

terms.name: Executive Security
terms.definition: Need-to-know filtering and audit trails for sensitive data
